summary: Independent QA accepts SIM-005 after second re-review. The previous valid-checksum event-tail crash and unsupported saved DomainEvent schemaVersion coercion blockers are resolved: loadSaveV1 now returns structured invalid-schema rejection reasons, preserves the original runtime on failure, and tests cover unknown event kind, malformed event field, and schemaVersion 999 on a known event kind. Save Envelope v1 DTO/codec, golden fixture workflow, Node/Worker shared canary, package boundaries, and M1 performance baseline meet the SIM-005 acceptance criteria.

tests_run.result: Writer fix handoff validates against project/schemas/handoff.schema.json.

2 test files passed; 8 tests passed, including golden fixture, corrupt/malformed save rejection, Node/Worker contract, unknown event kind, malformed event field, and unsupported event schemaVersion coverage.
6 test files passed; 32 tests passed; existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning for tests/fixtures/deterministic-rng-worker.ts.
Architecture boundaries passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.
Node/worker hello hash 61e0ba1c matched; command/query hash d275faa4 matched; save/load hash 28074edd matched; save/load byte length 10920.
Recursive workspace typecheck passed, including @monsoon/save-format, @monsoon/sim-core, and apps/web declaration coverage.

tests_run.command: QA repro: valid-checksum unknown event kind through loadSaveV1
tests_run.result: Returned status rejected with original runtime hash a38362fd and invalid-schema reason at body.eventTail[0].event.kind; no throw.

tests_run.command: QA repro: valid-checksum known event kind with event schemaVersion 999 through loadSaveV1
tests_run.result: Returned status rejected with original runtime hash a38362fd and invalid-schema reason at body.eventTail[0].event.schemaVersion; no silent load or coercion.
Architecture check, sim determinism, 13 root Vitest files/53 tests, and web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed; existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning appeared.
All matched files use Prettier code style.

decisions: Accepted the simulation_engineer decision to keep saved DomainEvent-tail validation in sim-core because the event DTOs are sim-core-owned semantics while save-format validates the generic envelope and event record shape.
Accepted v1-only saved DomainEvent tails for SIM-005: unsupported event schemaVersion values now reject rather than migrate or coerce.
Accepted the pure @monsoon/save-format DTO/codec package boundary for M1; it introduces no platform IO, compression, database, or external production dependency, and architecture:check passes.
Accepted the refreshed worker-compatible adapter declaration because the public save/load canary export remains and typecheck passes.
risks: Future Save Envelope or DomainEvent versions will need explicit migration or rejection tests before loading older/newer tails.
The event tail remains a bounded M1 compatibility/debug tail, not full event sourcing, consistent with ADR-004 and PROJECT_STATUS D-011.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator should run integration gates as required and decide the SIM-005 task state transition. QA found no remaining SIM-005 acceptance blocker.
